subcodes.first_line: We have heretofore set forth in eloquent language that which betokeneth pure grace and eternal remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بلغت فصحی از قبل ذکر نمودیم آنچه را که مشعر بر عنایت محضه و ذکر ابدیه بوده
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @blind imitation [taqlid], @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @spiritual transformation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action
